steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The passage closes with “can easily recognize” — this signals that the Spanish influence is obvious and noticeable throughout the state.

steps.title: Match the word to that meaning
steps.content: The target meaning is obvious and perceptible. “Palpable” expresses this exactly — it means clearly perceptible. “Understated” contradicts the sense of easy recognition, while “corroborated” and “disputed” describe different concepts. That matches choice A — A is correct.
